creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167591
patch

- Update to 2.1.8.20160225

distfile does not contain any version in its filename and distfile is always silently updated.
In this port, I'm using the date of Last-Modified header for part of PORTVERSION.

% curl --head http://c.speedtest.net/mini/mini.zip    
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Cache-Control: max-age=86400
Content-Type: application/zip
Date: Tue, 01 Mar 2016 07:42:24 GMT
Etag: "2c0899-5e6c88e-52ca02e13eac0"
Expires: Wed, 02 Mar 2016 07:42:24 GMT
Last-Modified: Thu, 25 Feb 2016 23:02:43 GMT <== THIS ==
Server: ECAcc (sjc/4E99)
X-Cache: HIT
X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN
X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
Content-Length: 99010702
